Legal Arena — Reusable Directory Submission Copy
Use this tab as the approved source text for future free-directory submissions. Verify pricing and product claims before reusing.
Build cases, argue against AI counsel, and face an AI judge.
Interview AI clients, build fact sheets, negotiate settlements, argue against AI counsel, and receive reasoned courtroom rulings in a browser-based legal strategy game.

Legal Arena is a browser-based AI lawyer game where players interview AI clients in their own words, organize facts, negotiate settlements, argue against AI opposing counsel, challenge other players, and receive reasoned rulings from an AI judge.
Use where the directory allows a full product description.

Product pricing; directory submissions themselves must remain free.
People interested in law, courtroom drama, debate, strategic reasoning, law students, legal professionals seeking simulation practice, and law-curious gamers.
Adapt only when a directory requests a narrower buyer profile.
Legal Arena is a game and training simulator. It is not legal advice, a law firm, or a substitute for hiring an attorney.
